title: Fig. 1 in Trichinella species circulating in wild boar (Sus scrofa) populations in Poland
author: Bilska-Zając, Ewa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. Example of electrophoretic patterns obtained from multiplex PCR on Trichinella larvae collected from wild boar. Lane 1 and 8 molecular weight marker (Fermentas 100 bp DNA Ladder); lanes 2 and 4, T. spiralis; lanes 3 and 5, T. britovi; lane 6, T. spiralis and T. britovi mixed infection; lane 7, negative control.
steps_raw: Fig. 1. Example of electrophoretic patterns obtained from multiplex PCR on Trichinella larvae collected from wild boar. Lane 1 and 8 molecular weight marker (Fermentas 100 bp DNA Ladder); lanes 2 and 4, T. spiralis; lanes 3 and 5, T. britovi; lane 6, T. spiralis and T. britovi mixed infection; lane 7, negative control.
